<?php namespace Http\Message\RequestMatcher; use Http\Message\RequestMatcher; use Psr\Http\Message\RequestInterface; /** * Match a request with a callback. * * @author Márk Sági-Kazár <mark.sagikazar@gmail.com> */ final class CallbackRequestMatcher implements RequestMatcher { /** * @var callable */ private $callback; public function __construct(callable $callback) { $this->callback = $callback; } public function matches(RequestInterface $request) { return (bool) call_user_func($this->callback, $request); } }
